title: WF's Cave Overhaul
description: Brand new noise caves for a new adventure
body:
*Compatible with Worldgen Revisited. Use worldtype -1 with cheese and spaghetti caves disabled if Worldgen Revisited is installed.*

 

### Ready to play, no configuration needed
Gives you brand new caves without any arduous configuration process. Just place the mod in your mod folder and you're set.

 

### Lightning Fast Generation
They're fast, too- clocking in at a screaming low 5 second difference between WF's Cave Overhaul and Minecraft's native caves when making a new world, you know you can have confidence in your FPS. The mod achieves this by replacing Minecraft's underlying noise caves with the mod's own, thus leveraging all the performance increases Mojang designed for their own noise caves. This contrasts with the traditional method of using carvers to make caves.

 

### Optimized for gameplay first, aesthetics second
These new caves are designed to foster an engaging caving experience. Will you set sail down one of the many new underground rivers only to lose control at a waterfall and fall into a bunch of lava? Perhaps! And keep track of where you go- this mod features new labyrinthine caves which are designed to get you turned around, so be warned, track your steps carefully or you'll get lost. As you wander, you'll encounter everything from ultra cramped spaces which make you wonder what's around the corner to large, expansive, caves which still offer a deep experience.

 

### Minecraft is now more dynamic than ever
These are not your standard noise caverns, too. They're using domain warping- a technique used to modify the nature of the regular noise to achieve new and curious ways. And due to this, as you dive deeper, the terrain gets weirder. But the effect is not overkill at this time. That might change in the future.

 

### Every cave is a new experience
...and more experiences are on the way. The goal of this mod is to make it so no two caving adventures are the same. Stay tuned to see what I have in store for you, and see how I plan to make your cave adventure even more chaotic!
